title: Tangy Velvety Norwegian White Bread Mix Pancakes
description: These pancakes combine tangy flavors from buttermilk and lemon zest with a velvety texture, all achieved using a white bread mix. Perfect for a quick kid-friendly breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the white bread mix, eggs, buttermilk, lemon zest, maple syrup, and sugar.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite toppings, such as melted butter, fresh fruit, or whipped cream.
